description: Personal RAG over your GitHub history (commits, code, reviews), served to Claude Code over MCP.
name: io.github.ChristopherDavenport/github-twin

environmentVariables.description: GitHub personal access token. Optional: github-twin can also pick the token up from `gh auth token` or from its own OAuth device-flow login (`gt auth login`).
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Enables the Claude backend for `gt summarize`, `gt distill`, and `gt eval`. Defaults to local Ollama when unset.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Enables the Gemini backend for embedding and the LLM seam. Vertex AI ADC via `GT_GEMINI_PROJECT` is also supported.
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Override the on-disk data directory holding the SQLite index, embeddings, and cached GitHub responses. Defaults to `$XDG_DATA_HOME/github-twin`.
environmentVariables.name: GT_PATHS__DATA_DIR

title: github-twin
